# Adroit

## Effect

Gain X Block.

## Sources And Targets

| Source | Source type | Target |
|---|---|---|
| Kifuda | Shop Relic | 3 cards |

## Notes

- Kifuda's Adroit value is 3 even though the relic text does not display the number.
- Cards can only have one enchantment.
